title: Become a Host
description: List your pet boarding establishment on Kennelo

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: Let's get your establishment set up
welcome.description: In just a few steps, you'll be ready to welcome pets into your establishment. We'll guide you through setting up your profile.

hostType.title: Your profile
hostType.subtitle: What type of host are you?
hostType.professionalDescription: Boarding, breeding, daycare, shelter or other business with a SIRET number
hostType.individualDescription: Pet-sitter, home boarding or occasional hosting

establishmentType.title: Establishment type
establishmentType.subtitle: What type of facility do you manage?
establishmentType.pensionDescription: Accommodation and care for pets during stays

contactDetails.title: Contact details
contactDetails.subtitle: How can pet owners reach you?

success.title: Congratulations!
success.description: Your establishment has been created successfully. You can now start welcoming pets!
